questionHtml: Suggest a reason for a larger percentage of corals being infected with white syndrome on reefs with a higher cover of corals.
markschemeHtml:
a. the closer the corals are (to each other) the easier the transmission;
b. other organisms in the community may act as vectors/carriers / OWTTE;

meta.title: Suggest a reason for a larger percentage of corals being infected with white syndrome on reefs with a higher cover of corals.
